# Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in Self-Learning Vision.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Learning system
- [ ] Provider integration
- [ ] Desktop packaging/runtime
- [ ] Release automation/security
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend typecheck passes.
- [ ] Frontend build passes, if UI changed.
- [ ] Release tooling tests pass, if packaging or release files changed.
- [ ] Native frozen-sidecar smoke test passes, if desktop packaging/runtime changed.
- [ ] Platform installation docs are updated, if artifact behavior changed.
- [ ] Public-safety scan reviewed.

## Public-Safety Checklist

- [ ] No real uploads, embeddings, local databases, logs, or generated private artifacts are included.
- [ ] No credentials or private environment files are included.
- [ ] No private machine paths are included.
- [ ] New provider behavior documents whether data leaves the local machine.
- [ ] New learning behavior is explainable, reviewable, and undo-friendly.

## Screenshots

Add public-safe screenshots for UI changes when useful.
